channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Can my credit card help if my vacation is affected by a military conflict or war?
item.description: If your travels are affected by a military conflict or war, your credit card may be able to help you navigate such an event. Here's how.

item.title: Savoring the Journey with Padma Lakshmi
item.description: The Emmy-nominated TV host dishes on the power of connection, food, fitness, and the art of finding joy.

item.title: A Practical Guide to Getting Fit in Midlife
Beyond 'visual expression': Alaska's plans for the Hawaiian Airlines brand
item.description: Alaska Airlines is keeping and investing in the Hawaiian Airlines brand as part of their merger.

item.title: Preventive Health Tests to Know After 50
Scientists Successfully Mine Meteorites for Precious Metals on International Space Station
item.description: Last week, GNN reported that fungi were being trailed by scientists in Austria for their potential to extract valuable metals from electronic and indu...

item.title: Zeno raises $25M to speed up production of its battery-swap motorbikes
item.description: The startup, co-founded by Tesla and Apple alumni, has sold nearly 1,000 of its motorbikes so far.

item.title: Science Corp raises $230M as it races to bring its brain implant to market
item.description: A source close to the company says the round assigns Science a post-money valuation of $1.25 billion.

item.title: KEF Muo Bluetooth Speaker: Portable Hi-Fi
item.description: Is a $250 Bluetooth speaker worth it? If it's this one made by KEF, it just might be.

item.title: Best Gravel Running Shoes (2026): Salomon, Adidas, Nike
item.description: The best new shoes in this hybrid, niche footwear style can take you from your front door, down the asphalt, and into the trees.

item.title: Philly Man Uses Mobile Laundromat to Wash Homeless Residents’ Clothes
item.description: A man who felt he needed a more fulfilling line of work began a mobile laundromat surface the wash the clothes of Philadelphia’s homeless population. ...

item.title: Suunto Vertical 2 Review: Catching Up to the Pack
item.description: Suunto's latest adventure fitness tracker finally introduces a bright AMOLED screen that's great for maps.

item.title: Meta will allow rival AI chatbots on WhatsApp in Europe, but for a fee
item.description: Meta will allow rival AI chatbot providers to offer their services on WhatsApp for a fee, which ranges from €0.0490 to €0.1323 per "non-template messa...

item.title: Nothing Has 2 New Midrange Phones, but Only 1 Will Be Sold in the US

item.title: Rivian is betting its future on one of the fastest EV launches in US history
item.description: If Rivian reaches its R2 sales target in 2026, it will be one of the fastest ramp-ups ever of a new EV in the United States.

item.title: Good News in History, March 5

item.title: Best Workout Headphones (2026), Tested in the Gym and in the Streets
item.description: Rock your inner jock with a pair of sturdy, sweatproof, and tangle-proof headphones. Here are our favorites.

item.title: Creamy Sausage Spaghetti
item.description: If you love a creamy pasta with big flavor, this creamy sausage spaghetti needs to be on your menu. Smoked…

item.title: This IHG hotel in Turks & Caicos is now open near a stunning turquoise-water beach
item.description: The Hotel Indigo Turks & Caicos Grace Bay is now open near Grace Bay Beach, and you can book it with IHG One Rewards points.

item.title: Why the Delta SkyMiles Reserve card is still one of the best cards in my wallet
item.description: Statement credits and lounge access are just two of the reasons why the Delta SkyMiles Reserve American Express is one of the best cards in my wallet.

item.title: Deal alert: Fly to Spain for only 14,000 Chase points
item.description: These deals put a dream trip to Spain within reach for anyone with pretty much any kind of transferable points.

item.title: Scientists Make a Super-Honey Using Cocoa Bean Waste For Chocolatey, Heart-Healthy Jolt

item.title: Tuscan Melting Cabbage
item.description: Groceries are expensive right now, so I’ve been leaning hard on the cheap staples. This melting cabbage with a garlicky…

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
